---
title: Run GO enrichment analysis on human-specific genes
date: 2023-08-24
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To identify enriched GO terms for the human-specific genes from 2023-08-18 (i.e., the genes which are upregulated in humans compared to mouse).


## Files and directories

### Code

The code can be found in `<species_dge software directory>/go_enrichment.R`.

### Output

The code can be found in `<species_dge results directory>/20230824`.


## Results

For each of the differential gene expression tests that was previously run, GO enrichment was performed on the human-specific genes. The full list of GO terms can be found in the CSV files.
